title: IT295R4 ARCHIVED - Taxable dividends received after 1987 by a spouse - Canada.ca
content:
## IT295R4 ARCHIVED - Taxable dividends received after 1987 by a spouse

## We have archived this page and will not be updating it.
You can use it for research or reference.

## We have archived this page and will not be updating it.
You can use it for research or reference.
This bulletin discusses the electioin to include in the taxpayer's income all taxable dividends received or deemed to have been received by the taxpayer's spouse in a taxation year ending after 1987.

## Ways to access the information
- Read the publication Online format it295r4-e.html

### Read the publication
